control: A ruleset with {type: required_linear_history} was created+deleted successfully → the rulesets API itself works; the merge_queue RULE TYPE is what is rejected.
conclusion: GitHub merge queue is unavailable on personal-account repositories (it is an Organization / Enterprise feature; public visibility does not grant it for user-owned repos). → §4 fallback.
